titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Ivan E. Phillips, Class of 1956, Yale College, Papers Documenting his Undergraduate Courses
Phillips (Ivan E), Class of 1956, Yale College, Papers Documenting his Undergraduate Courses
titlestmt.author: compiled by Mary Caldera and Kerry Shapleigh

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Friday September 4, 2020 at 07:24

did.unittitle: Ivan E. Phillips, Class of 1956, Yale College, papers documenting his undergraduate courses
did.abstract: The papers consist of the lecture notes, examinations, syllabi and handouts documenting Ivan Phillips's undergraduate courses taken between 1952-1956, including courses in history, economics, and science. Also included are several grade school notebooks.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 47 (YRG 47), Collections documenting teaching and learning in Yale academic programs.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: The materials were a gift of Ivan E. Phillips.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright has not been transferred to Yale University.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Ivan E. Phillips, Class of 1956, Yale College, Papers Documenting His Undergraduate Courses (RU 916). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Yale University records are arranged and described at the accession level by the creating office. The University Archives creates collection level descriptive records, but typically does no further arrangement and description at the accession level.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The papers consist of the lecture notes, examinations, syllabi and handouts documenting Ivan Phillips's undergraduate courses taken between 1952-1956, including courses in history, economics, and science. Also included are several grade school notebooks.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: Ivan Edward Phillips was born to Lazarus and Rosalie Idelson Phillips on May 10, 1934 in Montreal, Quebec. He prepared at the Selwyn House School in Montreal and at Deerfield before entering Yale in 1952. He graduated in 1956 as a history major. He was a member of Silliman College and Chi Psi Fraternity as well as a member of the Record Board from 1953-1955.
